Things To Do

Moments built into your evening — make the most of them.

📸
All evening
Disposable Cameras
One on every table — use it freely. Candid guest shots are always the best ones.
How to use ?

Point, frame your shot, then press the shutter button on top. Wind the film wheel after each shot. Flash button on the front — hold 2 sec to charge before shooting indoors.

Watch Kodak tutorial ↗
🎭
5:30 – 9:30 pm
Photobooth
Open for four hours on the Lower Lawn. Grab a friend and take home a memory.
🔥
6:30 pm
Fire Dance Show
A breathtaking fire performance with live pyrotechnics. Gather at Paliman Area before dinner.
🎵
During dinner
Live Acoustic Band
Sit back and enjoy live music throughout dinner. A perfect Bali evening.
🥂
5:30 pm onward
Cocktail Hour
Golden-hour drinks and canapés on the Lower Lawn. The perfect time to mingle.
🎮
8:45 pm
Games Session
Laugh with the couple — audience participation is very much encouraged.

Dress Code

Garden Formal — polished and elegant, suited for an outdoor tropical celebration.

For Her

Flowy midi or maxi, floral prints, soft pastels or earthy tones. Wedges, block heels, or dressy sandals — flats are very welcome on the grass.

For Him

Smart linen shirt, chinos or dress trousers. Light blazer optional. Loafers or leather sandals. Skip the heavy suit — Bali is warm!

This is an outdoor wedding — breathable fabrics are your best friend.
Wedges and block heels are recommended over stilettos on the grass.
Please avoid all-white or ivory. Those are reserved for the bride.

What to Bring

It's an outdoor Bali event — a little prep goes a long way.

☀️
Sunblock Must Bring
The ceremony and cocktail hour are fully outdoors. Apply before you arrive and bring a small bottle. SPF 30+ recommended.
🦟
Insect Repellent Must Bring
Tropical evenings mean mosquitoes. A small spray or lotion will keep you comfortable during outdoor dining.
👟
Comfortable Shoes
You'll walk across grass between venues. Wedges, block heels, or flats work best. Thin stilettos may sink into the lawn.
🌬️
A Light Wrap
Bali evenings can get breezy after dark. A light shawl or jacket is a smart addition.
📱
Charged Phone
For the fire show, ceremony moments, and photobooth. Come with a full battery.

Ayana Guests

Everything you need to navigate and enjoy your stay at Ayana Resort.

📱 Download the Ayana App

The Ayana App is your all-in-one resort companion. Use it to navigate the resort map, request buggy service, book Rock Bar, order room service, chat with concierge, and explore everything the resort has to offer — all from your phone.

🗺️ Interactive resort map
🚐 Request buggy transport
🍹 Book Rock Bar & restaurants
💬 Chat with concierge
🛎️ Room service & housekeeping
🌐 Available in English & Chinese
Download on the
App Store
Get it on
Google Play
🌿 Staying at RIMBA by AYANA?
🚐
Free 24-Hour Buggy Service
Buggies run between RIMBA and the main Ayana resort around the clock, every day. Call the front desk or flag one down — they come frequently and it's completely free.
📍
Getting to the Wedding Venues
Take the buggy from RIMBA to the main Ayana resort lobby. The wedding team will guide you to the Sky Amphitheatre for the ceremony and the Middle Lawn for dinner.
📍 Where to Go — Venue Map

The Sky Amphitheatre sits at the clifftop western edge of the Ayana estate, overlooking the Indian Ocean. Here's a simplified layout to help you get your bearings.

🗺️
Interactive Resort Map
The Sky Amphitheatre is at the top of the resort near Kubu Beach — on the clifftop overlooking the Indian Ocean. Tap below to open the official Ayana map with your venue pinned.
Open Ayana Map — Sky Amphitheatre

Tip: Once the map opens, the Sky Amphitheatre will be highlighted. You can also use it to navigate the full resort during your stay.

Additional Info

Getting to Ayana Resort from the airport, and other useful information for your trip.

📍
Resort Address
Jl. Karang Mas Sejahtera, Jimbaran, Bali 80364
Open in Google Maps →
Recommended
🟢
Grab
~IDR 60,000–90,000
Grab is Southeast Asia's most reliable ride-hailing app. Book a GrabCar from the airport in seconds. Make sure to download the app and set up your account before you land.
App Store Google Play
🔵
Bluebird / MyBluebird
~IDR 80,000–120,000
Bluebird is Bali's most trusted metered taxi company. Book via the MyBluebird app or use the official taxi queue outside arrivals. Always use the app or official queue — avoid touts.
App Store Google Play
🏨
Ayana Resort Transfer
~USD 25–35
Ayana offers pre-booked airport transfers. Contact the resort concierge in advance to arrange a private air-conditioned car to your room. Ideal for a stress-free arrival.
Contact Ayana →
🚌
Kura-Kura Resort Bus
~IDR 50,000
A scheduled shuttle bus connecting Ayana to Kuta, Seminyak and other tourist areas. Useful if you're exploring Bali around the wedding. Check the schedule at the resort lobby.
✈️ Airport Tips
Download Grab before you land — it's faster and cheaper than airport taxis.
Ngurah Rai International Airport (DPS) is only ~10 km from Ayana. The drive is short but can take 20–30 min in traffic.
For Grab pickups, use the designated ride-hailing zone outside the arrivals hall — follow the signs.
Have the resort address ready to show your driver: Jl. Karang Mas Sejahtera, Jimbaran.
We're so glad you're here with us.
Yun Heng & Tammie Jeanette · 28 March 2026 · Ayana Resort, Bali
